title: Village Shop System
description: Adds shelves and registers that let villagers autonomously shop, trade items for emeralds, pay at registers, and rest in chairs, with configurable pricing for vanilla trades, food, tools, potions, and enchanted books.
body:
Village Shop System

A Minecraft Mod (1.20.1(Forge, Neoforge & Fabric) and 1.21.1 (Fabric & NeoForge) that brings village commerce to life. Place shelves and registers in your village, and villagers will automatically start shopping on their own.

Key Features

Selling Shelves — Stock items on shelves and villagers will buy them with emeralds. Automatic pricing covers vanilla trades, food, tools, potions, and enchanted books.
Purchase Shelves — Set a desired item, and villagers will restock it in exchange for emeralds.
Registers & Shop Groups — Link multiple shelves and registers into a "shop group." Villagers browse the shelves, then head to the register to pay. Emerald earnings are automatically collected at the register.
Chairs & Standing Spots — Register stair blocks as chairs, and villagers will sit down to relax after shopping. Villagers who bought food will even show eating animations.
Shopping Rush — When a trade is completed, there's a small chance nearby villagers' cooldowns are reset, creating a lively shopping district.
Hopper Compatible — All shelves and registers support hopper input/output for seamless automation integration.
Highly Configurable — Cloth Config GUI for adjusting price multipliers, tradeable items, and villager behavior. Custom per-item pricing via JSON config files.
Multiplayer Support
Build a cozy shopping district that blends into your village and watch your villagers come alive with their daily routines.
